cooperative.contribution_mismatch: Ingano y'umusanzu ({{contributionSum}}kg) igomba kujya hamwe n'ububiko ({{totalQuantity}}kg).

buyer.delivery_confirmed: Itangwa ryemejwe! Ubwishyu bwoherejwe kuri koperative.

government.price_trends_subtitle: Ihindagurika ry'ibiciro by'ibihingwa mu masoko y'u Rwanda (RWF/kg)
government.national_forecast_subtitle: Gereranya igiciro kiriho n'igiteganyijwe ku bihingwa bikuru (RWF/kg)
government.price_volatility_subtitle: Ihindagurika ry'ibiciro — agaciro kari hejuru kerekana ibyago by'umutekano w'ibiribwa
government.food_security_subtitle: Ikigereranyo cy'ubushobozi n'ubusabe buri kwezi — isesengura ry'icyuho ku mutekano w'ibiribwa

forecast.title: Igiteganyo Gifashishijwe AI
forecast.subtitle: Kubona igiteganyo cy'ibiciro ukoresheje ubwenge bwa mashini.
forecast.details_subheader: Iminsi {{days}} iri imbere hamwe n'urwego rw'ikizere rwa 80%
forecast.how_to_use_point_median: Igiciro cyo hagati (median) ni cyo gishoboka cyane.
forecast.how_to_use_point_bounds: Imipaka yo hasi/hejuru yerekana urwego rw'ikizere rwa 80%.
forecast.how_to_use_point_trend: Imigendekere yerekana icyerekezo cy'ibiciro: UP, STABLE, cyangwa DOWN.
forecast.how_to_use_point_volatility: Ihindagurika rerekana uko isoko rihagaze: LOW, MEDIUM, cyangwa HIGH.
forecast.how_to_use_point_recommendation: Kurikiza igitekerezo (Gurisha Nonaha, Tegereza, Kurikirana) mu gufata icyemezo.
forecast.how_to_use_point_confidence: Ikizere kiri hejuru bivuze ko modeli ifite icyizere ku giteganyo.
forecast.start_hint: Hitamo igihingwa n'isoko hejuru, hanyuma ukande "Teganya" kugira ngo ubone ibiteganyo by'ibiciro.
forecast.chat_subtitle: Baza icyo ushaka ku bihingwa, ubuhinzi, cyangwa ibiciro ku isoko
forecast.chat_greeting: Muraho! Ndi umufasha w'ibihingwa wa AI. Ndagufasha ku makuru y'ibihingwa, inama z'ubuhinzi, ibitekerezo ku isoko, n'ibindi. Ni iki wifuza kumenya?

auth.login_subtitle: Injira muri konti yawe ya RASS
auth.farmer_phone_hint: Abahinzi bashobora gukoresha telefoni cyangwa imeyili. Abandi bagomba gukoresha imeyili.
auth.register_subtitle: Tangira kugura umusaruro mushya uhereye kuri koperative
auth.reset_subtitle: Kurikiza intambwe zo kugarura konti yawe
auth.reset_hint: Andika imeyili cyangwa telefoni yawe yanditse. Tuzohereza OTP y'imibare 6.
auth.reset_password_hint: Shyiraho ijambo ry'ibanga rishya kandi rikomeye.
auth.reset_success: Ijambo ry'ibanga rihinduwe neza! Uzasubira ku kwinjira...

errors.password_min: Ijambo ry'ibanga rigomba kuba rifite byibura inyuguti 6
errors.reset_failed: Guhindura ijambo ry'ibanga byanze. Ongera ugerageze.

hero.subtitle: Guhuza koperative zemewe n'isoko mpuzamahanga. Ubusobanuro bw'igihe nyacyo, ubucuruzi buboneye, no kugabanya igihombo cy'isarura.

home.featured_subtitle: Umusaruro wemejwe uva kuri koperative z'umwuga
home.no_produce_hint: Gerageza guhindura muyunguruzi cyangwa uko ushakisha.
home.live_prices_subtitle: Amakuru y'igihe nyacyo atangwa n'abahagarariye isoko
home.join_subtitle: Urufatiro rw'ikoranabuhanga mu buhinzi bw'u Rwanda. Gura umusaruro mushya, uyobore koperative, cyangwa utonde ubwikorezi byoroshye.

marketplace.title: Isoko rya Digitale
marketplace.subtitle: Shakisha umusaruro wemejwe uturutse kuri koperative. Amasezerano yizewe n'ibiciro bisobanutse.
marketplace.buyers_only: Abaguzi bonyine ni bo bashobora gushyira mu gasanduku. Iyandikishe nk'umuguzi.

cart.title: Agasanduku k'Ibicuruzwa
cart.approval_notice: Icyifuzo cyawe kizoherezwa kuri koperative ngo yemeze. Uzamenyeshwa iyo yemeye.

prices.subtitle: Amakuru aheruka atangwa n'abahagarariye isoko; isano n'ubuhanuzi igeze kwitegura.

storage.maintenance_notice: Kubungabunga sisitemu biteganyijwe ku wa Gatandatu utaha saa 22:00.

market_agent.recent_submissions_help: Ibyiciro byawe vuba byemejwe na sisitemu.

admin.title: Imiyoborere ya Sisitemu

admin.confirm_reset_farmer_password: Subiza ijambo ry'ibanga rya {{name}}? Ijambo ry'igihe gito ni 'Farmer123!'.
admin.manager_hint: Hitamo umukoresha ufite uruhare rwa CooperativeManager

settings.title: Igenamiterere rya Konti
settings.subtitle: Tegura umutekano n'ijambo ry'ibanga
settings.subtitle_full: Genzura umutekano, amakuru yo kuvugana, n'amatangazo ya {{name}}.
settings.new_password_required: Ijambo ry'ibanga rigomba kuba nibura inyuguti 6
settings.password_strength_error: Ijambo ry'ibanga rigomba kuba nibura inyuguti 8 kandi rikagira inyuguti nkuru n'umubare.
settings.otp_scan_guidance: Scan-a QR code muri Google/Microsoft Authenticator, hanyuma winjize code y'imibare 6.
settings.email_code_sent: Code yo kwemeza imeyili yoherejwe mu matangazo yawe.
settings.phone_code_sent: Code yo kwemeza telefone yoherejwe mu matangazo yawe.
settings.otp_notice: Gukoresha two-factor bizongera umutekano wa konti yawe.

licensing.title: Uburenganzira bwo Gukoresha & Umutungo bwite mu by'ubwenge
licensing.hero: Iyi porogaramu yakozwe na {{team}}, itsinda ry'abanyamwuga ba software bo muri Adventist University of Central Africa (AUCA).
licensing.ownership_body_one: Source code yose, igishushanyo cya product, data structures, branding assets, inyandiko n'imigendekere y'akazi by'iyi porogaramu ni umutungo wa PsyQode. Uburenganzira bwose burarinzwe n'amategeko agenga umutungo bwite mu by'ubwenge.
licensing.ownership_body_two: Nta gice na kimwe cy'iyi porogaramu cyemerewe gukopororwa, gusaranganywa, gusesengurwa inyuma (reverse engineering), kongera gukoreshwa mu bucuruzi cyangwa kongera gutangazwa hatabanje uruhushya rwanditse rwa PsyQode.
licensing.impact_title: Inshingano ku Ngaruka mu Bumenyi n'Igihugu
licensing.impact_body: PsyQode yubatse iyi sisitemu kugira ngo ishyigikire amasoko y'ubuhinzi arangwa n'ubunyangamugayo, ikomeze sisitemu z'ibiribwa by'u Rwanda, kandi igaragaze uruhare rwa AUCA mu guhanga udushya tw'ikoranabuhanga dufite ingaruka zifatika.
licensing.copyright: Copyright © {{year}} PsyQode (Adventist University of Central Africa). Uburenganzira bwose burarinzwe.

activation.success_subtitle: Konti yawe yemejwe. Ushobora kwinjira ukoresheje ijambo ry'ibanga rishya.

farmer_dashboard.subtitle: Aho umusaruro ukorerwa
farmer_dashboard.title: Idashibodi y'umuhinzi
farmer_dashboard.profile_request_sent: Icyifuzo cyo kuvugurura umwirondoro cyoherejwe ku muyobozi wa koperative.
farmer_dashboard.profile_history_deleted: Amateka y'ibisabwa byo kuvugurura umwirondoro yasibwe.
farmer_dashboard.ai_crop_recommendations_hint: Ibihingwa bikenewe cyane ku isoko kandi bifite icyuho mu musaruro.
farmer_dashboard.ai_assistant_intro: Nshobora gusesengura amatangazo y'isarura, ubwiza bw'ububiko n'uko ubwishyu bugenda kugira ngo ngutange inama y'intambwe ikurikira.
farmer_dashboard.ai_assistant_placeholder: Baza igihe cyiza cyo kugurisha, impuruza z'ibyago, cyangwa ingamba z'ibiciro...
farmer_dashboard.profile_update_hint: Ohereza impinduka usaba kugira ngo zemezwe n'umuyobozi wa koperative.
farmer_dashboard.no_profile_request_history: Nta mateka y'ibisabwa byo kuvugurura umwirondoro aragaragara.

buyer_dashboard.subtitle: Aho ibikorwa byo kugura bikorerwa
buyer_dashboard.title: Idashibodi y'umuguzi
buyer_dashboard.no_linked_listing: Iki cyifuzo nta gicuruzwa gihujwe na cyo. Kora icyifuzo uhereye ku gicuruzwa kugira ngo ukomeze kuri checkout.
buyer_dashboard.checkout_unavailable: Ntidushoboye gukomeza kuri checkout kuri iki cyifuzo ubu. Vugurura urupapuro wongere ugerageze.
buyer_dashboard.snapshot_title: Incamake y'ibikorwa byo kugura ako kanya
buyer_dashboard.no_active_listings: Nta bicuruzwa biri gukora biboneka ubu. Ushobora gukomeza ugakora icyifuzo cyanditse.
buyer_dashboard.ai_assistant_intro: Nshobora kugufasha kunoza igihe cyo kugura, kurangiza amasezerano, guhitamo abagurisha no kugabanya ibyago byo gutanga.
buyer_dashboard.ai_assistant_intro_two: Nshobora kunoza igihe cyo kugura, gutanga inama z'abagurisha, kunoza intera y'ibiganiro no kugabanya ibyago by'itangwa/amasezerano.
buyer_dashboard.ai_assistant_placeholder_one: Baza ku gihe cyiza, ingamba z'ibiganiro, amasezerano cyangwa ibyago by'itangwa...
buyer_dashboard.ai_assistant_placeholder_two: Baza icyo wagura, igihe wagurira, n'uko wagabanya ikiguzi cyo kugura...

cooperative_dashboard.subtitle: Ibikorwa byo gukusanya umusaruro
cooperative_dashboard.title: Idashibodi y'umuyobozi wa koperative
cooperative_dashboard.assistant_welcome: Mbaza icyo ushaka cyose ku mikorere ya koperative, ibyago, ibicuruzwa, ububiko cyangwa ingamba z'imikorere.
cooperative_dashboard.add_image_required: Ongeraho nibura ifoto imwe y'igicuruzwa mbere yo gukora listing.
cooperative_dashboard.ai_assistant_intro: Baza ibibazo byihariye ku ruhare rwawe n'ingamba zishingiye ku isesengura ryawe rigezweho.
cooperative_dashboard.assistant_preparing: Umufasha wa AI arimo gutegura igisubizo...
cooperative_dashboard.assistant_placeholder: urugero: Ni ikihe gihingwa twashyira imbere muri iki cyumweru kandi kuki?

national_market.food_security_index: Igipimo cy'umutekano w'ibiribwa ku rwego rw'igihugu
national_market.top_markets: Amasoko ya mbere ku mpuzandengo y'igiciro
national_market.top_crops: Ibihingwa bya mbere ku mpuzandengo y'igiciro

role_ai_panel.assistant_ready: AI Insights yiteguye. Baza icyo ushaka cyose ku mikorere y'uruhare rwawe, ibyago n'ibyihutirwa.
role_ai_panel.title: Ubwenge bw'imikorere bwa AI
role_ai_panel.summary_body: Iyi panel ya AI ihuza ibipimo by'imikorere, ibyago byagaragaye n'ibyihutirwa byasabwe ku ruhare ruriho. Iyo amakuru y'isoko, ububiko, amasezerano n'ubwikorezi ahindutse, ibi bisubizo birongera kubarwa kugira ngo ibyemezo bishingire ku makuru.

commentary.market_overview_detail: Ibimenyetso by'uturere bikurikiranwa: {{count}}. Itandukaniro ririmo gukurikiranwa hifashishijwe amakuru ya live.
commentary.operations_recommendation_detail: Habonetse ibisabwa bifunguye {{count}}. Shyira imbere guhuza amasezerano n'ubwikorezi kugira ngo ibicuruzwa bigere vuba.
commentary.capacity_advisory_detail: Ibisabwa bikora {{count}} bifata ubushobozi bw'ububiko ubu. Kuraho ibyarangiye vuba kugira ngo umuvuduko wo guhinduranya uzamuke.
